title: Import Dataset
selectFile: Select a ZIP file containing your annotated dataset
successMessage: Your dataset has been imported and is ready to use

error.invalidZip: Please select a valid ZIP file
error.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported dataset format. Supported formats: YOLO, COCO, Pascal VOC, CSV, Folders by Class, U-Net Masks
error.corruptedData: Dataset appears to be corrupted or incomplete
error.parse: Error parsing dataset. Please check the file format
error.invalidProjectName: Project name contains invalid characters. Use only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots
